name: human
identity: A group of humans living in a rough encampment in a harsh arctic environment, characterized by their hardened features and survivalist lifestyle.
current_status: Mill about a rough encampment in the firelight, displaying a wild and wary demeanor. Two specific figures are acting as captors, leading the player character toward an older, commanding figure by the fire.

appearance.value: draped in hides and crude furs, faces etched with wild and wary looks, features hardened by arctic environment

volatile_state.current_activity: Mill about the camp; two figures are acting as captors leading a prisoner toward an older leader.

notes: The group is currently acting as captors. Specific individuals include two robust/lean captors and one older, commanding figure.
